name: Turkari Palaak Molee
recipeIngredient: 1 kg Lean Diced Lamb (or Chicken), 800 ml Coconut cream, Salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a heavy pan.
2. Add onions and fry until golden brown.
3. Add garlic, ginger, and all spices except salt. Fry for 5 minutes until fragrant.
4. If the mixture is too dry, add a little water. Stir regularly to prevent burning.
5. Add lamb and toss through to coat with onion/spices.
6. Fry further 10 minutes, stirring to prevent burning/sticking.
7. Add thawed spinach and mix thoroughly.
8. Add coconut cream and salt. Stir well.
9. Add curry leaves. Bring to a rapid boil.
10. Reduce heat and allow to simmer for at least 1.5 hours covered.
11. Remove lid and simmer until sauce reduces, usually 15-30 minutes.
This is an exceptionally hot curry. If you prefer a milder curry, reduce the amount of chilli powder and hot paprika by half. The recipe also lends itself to substituting chicken for the lamb.
